title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Michael Donovan and Joe Furnari discussed rising computer component costs. Joe Furnari reported on P&L and financial outlook, needing a 2026 outlook and AR growth updates. Joe Furnari, Michael Donovan, and Paulo Trovao are strategizing to cleanse and target 20,000 Zoho contacts. Vinnie Micciche suggested simplifying segmentation and approved an immediate $2,000 spend for Clay and Apollo for data cleansing and lead enrichment, despite past tool underutilization. The team emphasized execution, accurate data via ICP, and client success involvement in auditing customer files.

decisions.description: Approved immediate spend of $2,000 for Clay and Apollo tools.
Agreed on the importance of execution and getting data right via ICP.
Agreed to involve the client success team to audit active customer files in Zoho.
Simplify contact segmentation into current, past, and cold leads.

actionItems.task: Update the P&L piece for the critical meeting, including 2026 outlook.

expectedOutcome.description: Updated P&L and 2026 outlook for critical meeting.

actionItems.task: Provide Vinnie Micciche with the list of canceled technical subscriptions.

expectedOutcome.description: List of canceled subscriptions provided to Vinnie Micciche.

actionItems.task: Launch email distribution ASAP using the cleaned contact list.

expectedOutcome.description: Initial email campaign launched to cleaned contact list.

actionItems.task: Perform initial data cleansing and enrichment using Clay with $2000 budget.

expectedOutcome.description: Contact data cleansed and enriched using Clay.

actionItems.task: Perform a sample email campaign on 25,000 Zoho records to assess bounce rate.

expectedOutcome.description: Bounce rate assessed; irrelevant contacts marked inactive.

actionItems.task: Document everything and send brief milestone updates to Vinnie Micciche.

expectedOutcome.description: Regular milestone updates provided to Vinnie Micciche.

actionItems.task: Create the ICP profile from the seven automotive groups.

expectedOutcome.description: Ideal Customer Profile defined for automotive groups.

actionItems.task: Use Apollo for email distribution temporarily until Zoho is dialed in.

expectedOutcome.description: Apollo used for temporary email distribution.

actionItems.task: Audit and update active customer files in Zoho.

expectedOutcome.description: Active customer files in Zoho audited and updated.

tensions: Increased cost of computer components (RAM, GPUs).
Prior calculation error in AR growth figures (Claude was off).
Frustration with past wasted spend on unused tools (Zoom Info).
Balancing speed vs. quality in contact cleansing.
Sensitivity about spending money on new tools due to past underutilization.
referencesToPast: Prior calculation error using Claude for AR growth.
Updating financial outlook from the prior investor deck.
Past experience with Zoom Info being too expensive and underutilized.
Team already cut $10,000-$20,000 in annualized tech costs.
Upgraded from 32 gigs DDR4 to 64 gigs DDR5 a year ago for $260, now $1,200.

contributions.description: Discussed high cost of RAM and GPUs, noting price increase.
Indicated need for more time on P&L for upcoming meeting.
Reported updating AR growth figures due to prior calculation error.
Outlined task to update and cleanse 20,000 contacts in Zoo.
Suggested simplifying contact segmentation into current, past, and cold leads.
Approved immediate spend of $2,000 for Clay and Apollo tools.
Affirmed Clay account exists and is core for lead enrichment.
Stressed that the core challenge is execution and having staff to do work.
Explained initial step involves compiling ICP based on seven automotive groups.
Proposed pulling Zoho data, running through Clay for enrichment/validation.
Prioritized 'instant motion' by running sample email campaign on contacts.
Stated $2,000 budget would launch the project, with $3,500 needed later.
Clarified Clay Pro subscription needed for 200-500 dealers, requiring 10,000 tokens.
Pointed out client success team needs to audit active customer files in Zoho.
